math_ug_217: 1. Cost of buying babqunach (72元/each) = 160 * 72 = 11520元 2. Selling price of babqunach (88元/each) = 160 * 88 = 14080元 3. Profit = Selling price - Cost = 14080元 - 11520元 = 2560元 The answer is 2560元
